response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of strong hands-on C++ development experience on Windows, with their most recent C++ work dating back to 2015 at National Instruments. While they have extensive experience in other languages (e.g., TypeScript, Node.js, D, Java), they do not meet the core technical requirements for this role. Domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking is also absent.
strengths: Fluent verbal and written communication abilities
Experience with SQL and database management
Proven ability to work in financial-services-adjacent environments (e.g., investment practices reshaping in Germany)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (last used in 2015)
No demonstrated domain expertise in fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets
Lack of recent C++ development experience (10+ years gap)
